findings.title: Keep runtime ownership explicit
findings.detail: The packet is strongest when ADL, not Gemini, stays visibly responsible for repo access, validation, and artifact writing.

findings.title: Preserve the welcoming tone
findings.detail: The demo should frame Gemini as a welcomed participant and avoid benchmark-style comparison language.

synthesis: Gemini contributes best here when ADL supplies the bounded packet, validates the output, and records a calm reviewer-facing artifact.
